task_completion.description: Open the patient record for John Zenon.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The GNU Health interface should display the patient record or evaluation screen for 'John Zenon' or 'Zenon, John'.

task_completion.description: Record an active condition for Electrocution/Electric shock.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A condition or diagnosis entry showing 'Electrocution', 'Electric shock', or an ICD-10 code starting with 'T75' or 'W86' in the patient's medical record or evaluation.

task_completion.description: Record a heart rate of 115 bpm in the patient evaluation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A patient evaluation form showing the heart rate (HR) field filled with the value '115'.

task_completion.description: Request at least two laboratory tests.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A lab test request screen or list showing at least two lab tests ordered for the patient (e.g., Creatine Kinase, Troponin, Basic Metabolic Panel).

task_completion.description: Prescribe an analgesic or topical burn treatment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A prescription or medication order screen showing a medication such as Ibuprofen, Acetaminophen, Naproxen, or Silver Sulfadiazine prescribed to the patient.

task_completion.description: Schedule a follow-up appointment between 1 and 5 days from today.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An appointment scheduling screen or calendar showing a new appointment created for John Zenon with a date 1 to 5 days after the current system date.

integrity.description: The agent used the GNU Health graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the GNU Health desktop client or web interface, not terminal commands or database scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual GNU Health application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches GNU Health (Tryton-based GUI), rather than a text editor, mock application, or unrelated software.

integrity.description: The agent manually navigated and entered data into the appropriate fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the progression of opening menus, filling out forms, and saving records, rather than instantly appearing completed forms.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target patient is John Zenon. The required diagnostic codes for the shock are T75 or W86. The required clinical evaluation heart rate is exactly 115 bpm. At least 2 lab orders must be requested. The follow-up appointment must be scheduled exactly 1 to 5 days from the task start date.
